svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" type="device"> <diagram name="Security layers" id="dploy-sec-layers"> <mxGraphModel dx="960" dy="520" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="960" pageHeight="520" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="l0" value="Admission — Pod Security Admission (restricted) + Kyverno" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eef2ff;strokeColor=#6366f1;fontColor=#4338ca;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=16;spacingTop=8;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="40" width="840" height="448" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l1" value="Network — NetworkPolicy (default-deny ingress + egress)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe4e6;strokeColor=#e11d48;fontColor=#9f1239;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=16;spacingTop=8;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="90" y="80" width="780" height="384" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l2" value="Compute — ResourceQuota + LimitRange" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef9c3;strokeColor=#ca8a04;fontColor=#854d0e;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=16;spacingTop=8;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="120" width="720" height="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3" value="Storage — no hostPath · ephemeral limits · scoped StorageClass" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e3a8a;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=16;spacingTop=8;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="150" y="160" width="660" height="256" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l4" value="Runtime — Kata Containers (per-pod microVM)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ede9fe;strokeColor=#7c3aed;fontColor=#4c1d95;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=16;spacingTop=8;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="180" y="200" width="600" height="192" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pod" value="Environment Pod
user-selected chart
runtimeClassName: kata-qemu" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dcfce7;strokeColor=#16a34a;fontColor=#166534;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="210" y="244" width="540" height="124" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="footer" value="Per-environment namespace · dploy.dev/managed=true · outer layers gate, inner layers sandbox" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=11" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="492" width="840" height="24" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
svg.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif
svg.aria-label: Defense in depth for a Dploy environment, drawn as concentric layers. From the outside in: Admission (Pod Security Admission restricted plus Kyverno), Network (default-deny NetworkPolicy), Compute (ResourceQuota and LimitRange), Storage (no hostPath, ephemeral limits, scoped StorageClass), Runtime (Kata Containers per-pod microVM), and at the center the environment Pod running a user-selected chart. All layers apply to the per-environment namespace labelled dploy.dev/managed=true.
svg.text: Storage — no hostPath · ephemeral limits · scoped StorageClass
Per-environment namespace · dploy.dev/managed=true · outer layers gate, inner layers sandbox
